id: auth.user

## Purpose
User entity at accepted with bare-text Rationale (no wikilinks) — error.

## Rationale
We need a user account. Identity matters. No back-sourcing here on purpose.

## Invariants
None beyond Fields constraints.

## Fields

| Field | Type | Notes        |
|-------|------|--------------|
| `id`  | uuid | Primary key. |
